project.title: Projects
project.name: Project Name
project.emptyHint: Click the button above to create a new project

settings.title: Settings
settings.generalDesc: General application behavior and local file paths.
settings.providersDesc: Manage custom OpenAI-compatible APIs and local ComfyUI workflows.
settings.promptDesc: Auto-enhancement, template library, and quality tag settings.
settings.appearanceDesc: Tune visual defaults and edge routing.
settings.customApiSettingsDesc: Add one or more OpenAI-compatible interfaces, such as SiliconFlow or any third-party compatible endpoint.
settings.customApiListHint: Each interface keeps its own base URL, API key, and available model names.
settings.customApiCardHint: Models are entered one per line and appear directly in the canvas model selector.
settings.customApiRequestModeHint: Use Images API for standard OpenAI image gateways. Switch to Chat Completions for Gemini image-preview style gateways.
settings.customApiOmitSizeParamsHint: Enable this for non-standard gateways that fail when receiving size or image_size.
settings.customApiModelsHint: One model ID per line, exactly as required by the target API.
settings.comfyDesc: Configure a local ComfyUI endpoint, health check, and workflow templates.
settings.comfyEnabledDesc: Turn on the local ComfyUI provider and expose its workflows in model selection.
settings.comfyWorkflowHint: Each workflow maps a task type to a Prompt API JSON template and required node ids.
settings.comfyMissingWorkflowConfig: Please finish the ComfyUI workflow configuration in Settings first
settings.providerRoutingDesc: Choose the preferred provider channel for each task type.
settings.downloadPresetPathsDesc: Used by node toolbar quick-save menus.
settings.missingAnyApiKeyMessage: No provider is configured yet. Add a custom API interface or a ComfyUI workflow to start generating.
settings.storyboardGenKeepStyleConsistent: Keep storyboard style aligned with references
settings.storyboardGenKeepStyleConsistentDesc: Append a style-consistency hint when generating storyboard grids.
settings.storyboardGenDisableTextInImage: Disallow text rendered inside storyboard images
settings.storyboardGenDisableTextInImageDesc: Append a no-text-in-image hint during storyboard generation.
settings.storyboardGenAutoInferEmptyFrameDesc: Append an inference hint for storyboard cells with no explicit description.
settings.ignoreAtTagWhenCopyingAndGeneratingDesc: Keep reference markers readable in the canvas while stripping marker syntax from copied or generated text.
settings.useUploadFilenameAsNodeTitle: Use uploaded filename as node title
settings.useUploadFilenameAsNodeTitleDesc: New upload nodes will use the source file name by default.
settings.radiusPresetDesc: Control the global corner style for panels, inputs, and nodes.
settings.themeToneDesc: Choose neutral, warm, or cool tint for both themes.
settings.edgeRoutingModeDesc: Switch path style between spline, orthogonal, and smart orthogonal edges.
settings.accentColorDesc: Used by buttons, selection borders, and highlights.
settings.aboutIntro: A multimodal canvas workstation for generation, editing, routing, and storyboard assembly.
settings.autoCheckUpdateOnLaunchDesc: Check for updates whenever the app starts.
settings.enableUpdateDialogDesc: Show a dialog when a newer version is detected.
settings.enableStoryboardGenGridPreviewShortcutDe: Hold Ctrl + Alt + Shift while clicking Generate on storyboard generation to output a grid preview without sending an AI request.
settings.showStoryboardGenAdvancedRatioControlsDe: Show overall and cell ratio information in storyboard generation.
settings.versionFeedDesc: Choose how the app checks the latest available version.
settings.checkUpdateUpToDate: You are already on the latest version.
settings.checkUpdateFailed: Update check failed. Please try again later.

update.dialogDescription: A new version is available. Do you want to download it now?
update.ignoreTodayVersion: Do not remind this version today
